hero.title: Prayer, welcome, and service in a Catholic parish community.
hero.welcome: This homepage is a placeholder version of the live parish design. Replace the copy, photos, and parish details with your own content in the CMS.

quickMassIntro.title: A clear place for worship information
quickMassIntro.copy: Use the panel below for the most frequently needed Mass, confession, and livestream details.

mission.title: A short statement of prayer, welcome, and service
paragraphs: Use this section for the parish mission, spiritual character, and community priorities.
Replace the placeholder text with the real story of your parish, its patron, and the ministries that shape parish life.
bullets: A brief parish welcome for visitors and regular worshippers
One or two lines about liturgy, prayer, and sacramental life
A short description of charity, outreach, and community service
mission.imageAlt: Placeholder image for patron saint artwork.
mission.caption: Replace this placeholder image with artwork, a statue, or a parish photograph.

parishLife.title: Show worship, community, and outreach at a glance
parishLife.copy: These cards can point visitors towards groups, practical help, and parish activities.

cards.title: Formation, fellowship, and service
cards.body: Use this card to introduce children's liturgy, youth, catechesis, choirs, social gatherings, and volunteer groups.

cards.title: Local works of charity
cards.body: Replace this text with the real ministries, support services, and outreach projects connected with the parish.
cards.imageAlt: Placeholder image for an outreach partner.

cards.title: Moments from parish life
cards.body: Add albums in the CMS to display sacramental celebrations, feast days, and community events.

contactHighlight.title: Come to church, contact the office, or support the mission
contactHighlight.copy: This section highlights the parish address, office details, clergy contact, and safeguarding routes.
